productName: DBG Infused Pre-roll Super Silver Haze & Bruce Banner - 1g
description: A hybrid infused joint built on Super Silver Haze & Bruce Banner and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a sweet, spicy-citrus aroma with a bright, energetic, cerebral feel, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe. A little goes a long way.
